title: Mayor Boodle Forgives the Straw Hats
description: On pages 11–14, Orange Town deals with the aftermath of Buggy’s defeat, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami decide what they will carry away from the island.
scene: Buggy’s threat has been broken, but the town is still tense: the villagers, Mayor Boodle, Chouchou, and the Straw Hats all react to the damage left behind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You won't be able to say that you've forgotten us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You know them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm...! sort of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Sort of"!? We have a long history!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So you have a gang now?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I guess we get to teach you all a lesson

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stealing from others is such a terrible thing to do,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha, man, don't faint like a coward! Stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, hold your face up prop- e rely!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Aah! Chief, you're awake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm so glad you're alright!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Just what on earth happened, chief?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: When we came it was already like this

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did you see any- thing?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah! Until just a while ago these three weird guys were...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those kids...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: were those kids still alive...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...that idiot!!! Doing such a rude thing to an old guy like me! How dare he!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't worry. We chased those idiots away

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I'm still pretty mad. It was like they were laughing at us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those kids don't know how mad we are about the damage done to our village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We should probably go and catch those kids...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Only one person has the right to be mad at those kids... only me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I won't forgive anyone who says anything bad about those kids other than me!!!

summary: The part closes the Orange Town conflict by shifting from combat to consequences: treasure, forgiveness, pride, and the Straw Hats’ departure.
